meta.name: Envision Spacing Tokens
meta.description: 4px-base spacing scale. Use these values for all padding, margin, and gap — never arbitrary numbers.

4.description: Default inline padding, body copy margin between paragraphs.

5.description: Between related items in a stack.

6.description: Card padding default. Comfortable inline padding.

12.description: Major block separation. Hero vertical padding (mobile).

20.description: Section vertical padding (spacious). Hero vertical padding (desktop).

24.description: Large hero padding. Major section breaks.

32.description: Editorial whitespace. Use sparingly for impact.

container-x.description: Default horizontal padding inside a container.

stack-tight.description: Tight vertical rhythm between related elements.

stack-loose.description: Loose vertical rhythm between content blocks.

allowed: Use values from this scale for all padding, margin, and gap.
When unsure between two values, choose the larger for better hierarchy.
Section vertical padding should be at minimum 64px on desktop, 48px on mobile.
forbidden: Do not use arbitrary values like 13px, 27px, 50px, 75px.
Do not use values smaller than 4px for spacing.
Do not stack sections without adequate vertical rhythm (minimum 48px between sections).
